name: lyceum
description: A portable, evidence-based meta-learning system. A chain of eleven skills that teaches any subject from absolute beginner to mastery using the techniques with the strongest support in learning science: retrieval practice, spaced repetition, interleaving, deliberate practice, mastery learning (with targeted remediation on a failed gate), backward design, and an on-demand read-only tutor for in-context questions. All state lives in one manifest.json per subject, so courses pause, resume, and transfer across sessions and machines.
